title: Hornet Removal in Bronxville, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Bronxville, Westchester. Safe nest elimination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service!
intro: Hornets can pose serious threats to Bronxville residents and their families, especially when nests are built near homes, gardens, or walkways. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe, and effective hornet removal services throughout Bronxville and surrounding Westchester areas. Our licensed technicians use proven methods to eliminate hornet nests and prevent future infestations.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Bronxville's unique mix of historic homes and modern properties, Best Pest Control NYC understands the specific challenges homeowners face with stinging insects. Our team provides same-day or next-day service, uses environmentally responsible treatments, and offers a satisfaction guarantee on all hornet removal services.
localContext: Bronxville's tree-lined streets, beautiful Tudor and Colonial homes, and proximity to the Bronx River Parkway create ideal conditions for hornet nesting during warmer months. From properties near Lawrence Hospital Center to residences along Pondfield Road, our technicians are familiar with the village's architecture and can safely access nests in eaves, attics, trees, and outdoor structures.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Bronxville?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Bronxville typically range from $350 to $550, depending on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground-level nests are generally less expensive than those in high or hard-to-reach areas like attics or tall trees. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Bronxville?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day hornet removal service throughout Bronxville. Most hornet nest removals are completed in one visit lasting 1-2 hours. Emergency services are available for situations where hornets pose immediate danger to residents, especially children or individuals with allergies.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal methods prioritize the safety of your family and pets. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during treatment. We'll advise you on any necessary precautions, such as keeping pets indoors during application, and the treated area is typically safe within a few hours.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than most wasps and yellow jackets, with bald-faced hornets being common in Bronxville. Hornets build large, paper-like aerial nests in trees and under eaves, while yellow jackets often nest in the ground or wall voids. All can sting multiple times, but hornets are generally more aggressive when defending their nests, making professional removal essential.
